chain.thought: Explanation: Counting by location, Rome has 11 stations (rows 1, 7, 12, 13, 14, 16, 17, 18, 21, 22, 26), while Milan has 8 (rows 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 11, 20, 27). Therefore, Rome has more radio stations than Milan.

judge_thought:

- Milan: rows 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 11, 20, 27 → 8 stations.
